```{bash}

cd /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data
conda activate gatk_gcnv
nextflow run ../main.nf \
    --index_file /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/sample_file_path.tsv \
    --ref /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.fna \
    --gff /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.gff \
    --bed /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/bed_file/resistance_regions.bed \
    --snpeff_db An_stephen \
    --outdir ./resistance_result_test_an \
    -resume \
    --workflow resistance \
    -profile conda 

cd /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data
conda activate gatk_gcnv 
nextflow run ../main.nf \
    --index_file /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/sample_path.tsv \
    --ref /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.fna \
    --gff /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.gff \
    --bed /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/bed_file/resistance_regions.bed \
    --snpeff_db An_stephen \
    --outdir ./resistance_result_test_2 \
    -resume \
    --workflow resistance \
    -profile conda 
# running for the cox 

nextflow run ../main.nf \
    --index_file /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/sample_file_path.tsv \
    --ref /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/reference/sequence.fasta \
    --gff /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.gff \
    --bed /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/bed_file/cox_1_region.bed \
    --snpeff_db An_stephen \
    --outdir ./cox_result \
    -resume \
    --workflow cox \
    -profile conda
# this runs smoothly and i need to add the to make the consensus file generation 

# comand to make sample file with samle name and absolute path 
cd /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/run_1_An_stephensi
echo -e "sample\tfastq" > sample_file_path.tsv

for f in *.fastq.gz; do
    sample=$(basename "$f" .fastq.gz)
    echo -e "${sample}\t$(realpath "$f")" >> sample_file_path.tsv
done

cp /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/run_1_An_stephensi/sample_file_path.tsv /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data

cd /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data
nextflow run ../main.nf \
    --index_file /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/sample_file_path.tsv \
    --ref /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/reference/sequence.fasta \
    --gff /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.gff \
    --bed /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/bed_file/cox_1_region.bed \
    --snpeff_db An_stephen \
    --outdir ./cox_result \
    -resume \
    --workflow cox

```

```{bash}
# for the its region one thing i plan to do is that to extract the its reads from the sample fastq files , one of the reason for doing this is that the region is repetitive and align to different regions in the reference file so it is difficult to do the variant calling there 

nextflow run ../main.nf     --index_file /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/sample_path.tsv     --ref /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.fna     --gff /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.gff     --bed /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/bed_file/resistance_regions.bed     --snpeff_db An_stephen     --outdir ./its_test        --workflow its --barcodes /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/barcodes/its_primer_barcodes.tsv -resume 

# the above command is using to run the ITS analysis which extracts the reads of its from the fastq file and process the analysis 

# one caution is that when using different sets of primer we need add the barcode primers sequences in the barcode files.



```

```{bash}
# generating output from the clair so we can do the consensus 
# this is for cox 
conda activate muhaps-clair3 - which contain the clair and other tools 
cd /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data
nextflow run ../main.nf     --index_file /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/sample_path.tsv     --ref /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/reference/sequence.fasta     --gff /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.gff     --bed /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/bed_file/cox_1_region.bed    --snpeff_db An_stephen     --outdir ./clair_test        --workflow clair -profile conda


# for running the 
```

```{bash}
# for running the its reads for all of the samples 
nextflow run ../main.nf     --index_file /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/sample_file_path.tsv     --ref /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.fna     --gff /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.gff     --bed /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/bed/its_file.bed    --snpeff_db An_stephen     --outdir ./its_test        --workflow its --barcodes /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/barcodes/its_primer_barcodes.tsv   -profile conda -resume

# with new reference of its2
nextflow run ../main.nf     --index_file /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/sample_path.tsv     --ref /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/reference/its_reference_AY157678.1.fasta     --gff /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.gff     --bed /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/bed/its_file.bed    --snpeff_db An_stephen     --outdir ./its_new_reference        --workflow its --barcodes /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/barcodes/its_primer_barcodes.tsv   -profile conda -resume


bcftools index /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/its_new_reference/clair_only/clair_output/OHTNST_1744/OHTNST_1744.merge_output.vcf.gz
    whatshap phase \
        --reference /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/reference/its_reference_AY157678.1.fasta \
        --indels \
        --sample OHTNST_1744 \
        --ignore-read-groups \
        -o /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/its_new_reference/clair_only/clair_output/OHTNST_1744/OHTNST_1744.merge_output_phase.vcf.gz \
        /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/its_new_reference/clair_only/clair_output/OHTNST_1744/OHTNST_1744.merge_output.vcf.gz \
        /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/its_new_reference/alignment/OHTNST_1744/OHTNST_1744.sorted.bam
```

```{bash}

nextflow run ../main.nf     --index_file /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/sample_path.tsv     --ref /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/reference/its_reference_AY157678.1.fasta     --gff /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.gff     --bed /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/bed/its_file.bed    --snpeff_db An_stephen     --outdir ./its_new_reference_two       --workflow clair -profile conda
```

```{bash}

# Updated script to accept both the cox and its analysis from alignment to making fasta file using clair , whatsap , bcftools consunses 
nextflow run ../main.nf     --index_file /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/samp
le_path.tsv     --its_ref /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/reference/its_reference_AY157678.1.fasta    --cox_ref ../../reference/sequence.fasta  --gff /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.gff        --snpeff_db An_stephen     --outdir ./its_new_reference_two       --workflow test  -profile conda --its_bed ../bed/its_file.bed  --cox_bed ../bed/cox.bed -resume

# updated script for running the resistance target genes 
nextflow run ../main.nf     --index_file /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/test_data/sample_path.tsv     --ref /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.fna     --gff /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/Nanopore-variant-calling-pipeline/reference/GCF_013141755.1_UCI_ANSTEP_V1.0_genomic.gff     --bed /mnt/storage13/ahri/Anopheles_stephensi/bed_file/resistance_regions.bed     --snpeff_db An_stephen     --outdir ./resistance_result_test_2     -resume     --workflow resistance     -profile conda

```
